name: mapbox
description: Mapbox skills and MCP servers for building location-aware applications with AI. Includes geospatial tools, style management, search, routing, migration, and patterns for web, iOS, Android, Flutter, and AI agent frameworks.

interface.shortDescription: Mapbox skills and MCP servers for location-aware development.
interface.longDescription: Build, migrate, optimize, and review Mapbox applications with bundled skills for web, mobile, search, cartography, token security, MCP workflows, and geospatial operations.
defaultPrompt: Set up Mapbox in my React app.
Optimize this Mapbox map with many markers.
Use Mapbox tools to find places near me.
